Why would someone buy a Geronimo Zero T-shirt?

questions.text: The poster persuades children to visit the water park by suggesting that
options: Geronimo Zero is a special ride.
you do not need to line up to ride Geronimo Zero.

questions.text: What is the purpose of the first paragraph?
options: to tell the reader about Tilly’s character
to show how early Tilly had to get up
to introduce the location for the story

questions.text: Which word describes how Tilly felt about getting up so early?
Why does Tilly lean forward as she climbs onto the bus?
options: to get her trumpet and backpack out of the rain
to save herself from slipping on the steps
to stop herself from falling backwards
to prevent her bag being caught in the doors

questions.text: The bus is very crowded because
options: people want to avoid the rain.
the storm woke people up early.
many children are going to school.

questions.text: What wakes Tilly up on the bus?
options: the bumpy movement of the bus
the other children leaving the bus

questions.text:

The three headings provide information about
options: three stages of growth of the cacao tree.

questions.text: People do not climb cacao trees because
options: the tree trunks are covered in pods.

questions.text: What happens first?
Most cocoa beans now come from
At which stage do you get cocoa beans?
Which question is not answered by this text?
options: Where did cacao trees first grow?

questions.text: Ingredients added to the cocoa beans will change the chocolate’s flavour. According to the text, what else can affect the chocolate’s flavour?
What do the words stumbled upon (paragraph 1) tell us?
options: The boy was walking in a dangerous area.
The boy found the mammoth by accident.
The boy had been looking for the mammoth for a long time.

questions.text: Why did it take the scientists a week to remove the bones from the ground?
options: Most of the ground was still frozen.
The unpleasant smell made the scientists ill.
The soil around the bones had turned into a thick mud.
The steam coming from the ground made the work dangerous.

questions.text: Why was this mammoth particularly interesting to scientists?
options: It was in very good condition.
It was found by a young boy.
It was an unusually large mammoth.

questions.text: What new information did the scientists discover about the mammoth’s hump?
options: It is larger than they expected.
It is harder than they expected.

questions.text: Why is Alexei Tikhonov mentioned in this text?
options: He explains why the events happened.
He gives an expert view on the subject.

questions.text: The date 6 October is written under the heading because it is the day
options: the news report appeared in the media.
the mammoth was dug from the ground.
the museum will display the mammoth.
